name: ultradoc
description: Answer ultra-precise questions — and generate grounded, citation-checked reference docs — about any open-source project from its real source code, issues, PRs, docs and the web. Grounded retrieval, not the model's memory. A skills.sh agent skill.

scripts.check:build: tsup && node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- scripts/ultradoc.mjs skills/ultradoc/scripts/ultradoc.mjs && node scripts/verify-skill-bundle.mjs
scripts.demo: node scripts/ultradoc.mjs ask --repo tests/fixtures/sample-lib --q "how does the retry backoff work?" --sources code,docs --out /tmp/ultradoc-demo

author: maxgfr
